name: copilotnotify
description: Sends a Telegram push notification when the CopilotNotify chat participant finishes responding.

chatParticipants.name: copilotnotify
chatParticipants.description: Notifies you on Telegram when this participant finishes responding.

copilotNotify.enabled.description: Enable or disable Telegram notifications from the CopilotNotify participant.

copilotNotify.telegramChatId.description: Your Telegram chat ID (personal, group, or channel). Not a secret — bot token is stored separately in SecretStorage.

copilotNotify.notifyOnSuccess.description: Send a Telegram notification when a Copilot agent task completes successfully.

copilotNotify.notifyOnFailure.description: Send a Telegram notification when a Copilot agent task fails or is cancelled.

copilotNotify.cooldownSeconds.description: Minimum number of seconds between consecutive notifications. Set to 0 to disable cooldown.

copilotNotify.messageFormat.description: Notification message format. 'default' includes status and task label; 'minimal' sends a short one-liner.

scripts.compile: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('out', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p ./
